data: Learn how to make polite requests at work

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to make polite requests at work.

A polite request gets a better response and shows professionalism.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/da178047-ea27-46e4-b9ef-e8de64088db0-49.-Making-Polite-Requests.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you need someone to do something at work, use this structure:

"Would it be possible for you to [action] by [time]?"

For example: "Would it be possible for you to share the file by end of day?"
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/da178047-ea27-46e4-b9ef-e8de64088db0-49.-Making-Polite-Requests.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If you need your manager to review a report, you can say:

"Would it be possible for you to review my report by tomorrow morning?"
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/da178047-ea27-46e4-b9ef-e8de64088db0-49.-Making-Polite-Requests.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure makes your request sound polite and reasonable.

It gives the other person a clear deadline and enough time to respond.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/da178047-ea27-46e4-b9ef-e8de64088db0-49.-Making-Polite-Requests.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice making polite requests at work!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to ask a colleague to share a file

1.Would it be possible for you to share the file by end of day?
2.Can you please send me the file now because I need it urgently.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to ask your manager to review a report

1.Would it be possible for you to review my report by tomorrow morning?
2.Please review my report because I have been waiting for too long.

Correct answer: 1
Would&&it&&be&&possible for&&you&&to share&&the&&file by&&end of day?
Would&&it&&be&&possible for&&you&&to review&&my&&report by tomorrow morning?
Would&&it&&be&&possible for&&you&&to complete&&your task by Friday?
Would&&it&&be&&possible for&&you&&to approve&&my plan by noon?
Would&&it&&be&&possible for&&you&&to send&&the&&feedback by Thursday evening?

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
